author: claude-bugfix
content: Plan: Fix 6 bugs from adversarial review. CRITICAL: (1) Object.prototype pollution in instrument.ts - move 3 utility methods to module-level functions, (2) innerHTML/outerHTML setter in stealth.ts uses wrong descriptor lookup - fix to use Element.prototype. MAJOR: (3) Memory leaks in wrappedObjects/proxies - use WeakSet/FinalizationRegistry, (4) generateErrorObject crashes on non-Error types - add try/catch fallback, (5) getLineInfo/getFileName crash on empty stacks - add null/bounds checks, (6) cleanErrorStack only replaces first occurrence with confused type handling - fix replace logic. Need to get stealth files from remote commit 8cf50d5 first.
